model.closed_collar_rule: compose a length-2 or length-3 word cyclically by identifying the final ordered output stubs with the first ordered input stubs
model.fixed_outer_fiber: one four-color key on the closing edges is fixed per run
model.switch_rule: single edge-Kempe switch on a two-color component disjoint from every output-stub representative edge, including the closing edges

source: Section 9.2 closed-collar length-2/3 full-interface avoidance lab
